boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-QUA-071-P requires pre-change callback source in chain
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pre-change callback gate open per policy
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: All four gates required before release; callback defect blocks

final_answer: ESCALATE. The pre-change callback source requirement from STD-QUA-071-P is not met, as CALL-QUA-071 used a post-change email instead of the pre-change vendor-master phone source. This defect, along with the timing defect blocking the release gate, prevents payment release. The action cannot proceed until these critical source and timing issues are resolved.
